ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizing_specifications" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size specification */,
  "label_sizing" TEXT /* Label size for the garment (e.g., XTRA SMALL, SMALL) */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "back_crotch" TEXT /* Back crotch measurement in inches */,
  "front_crotch" TEXT /* Front crotch measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "full_length" TEXT /* Full length measurement in inches */,
  "garment_type" TEXT /* Type of garment (e.g., pants, shirts) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the garment is designed */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the garment */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type (e.g., regular, slim, relaxed) */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the sizing specification was created */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date the sizing specification was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the sizing_specifications table */,
  "label_sizing" TEXT /* Label size for the garment */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "back_crotch" TEXT /* Back crotch measurement in inches */,
  "front_crotch" TEXT /* Front crotch measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "full_length" TEXT /* Full length measurement in inches */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the sizing_specifications table */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to a customer table */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the fit (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "fit_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer about the fit */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_roles table */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each size specification
Label size for the garment (e.g., XTRA SMALL, SMALL)
Gender for which the garment is designed
Date the sizing specification was created
Date the sizing specification was last modified
User ID of the last modifier
